# YouTube Comments Analyzer

> AI-powered tool that analyzes the comment section of any public YouTube video. It extracts overall sentiment (positive/neutral/negative), surfaces key discussion themes, and generates a concise summary so creators, marketers, and researchers can understand audience reactions without reading hundreds of comments.

Key facts:
- Analyze any public YouTube video by pasting its URL.
- Output includes a sentiment breakdown, key discussion points, and a comprehensive summary.
- Free tier analyzes up to 100 comments per video; paid plans analyze more.
- Uses the official YouTube Data API; private and unlisted videos are not supported.
- A free Chrome extension runs the analysis directly on YouTube video pages.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://commentsanalyzer.info/): Product overview and entry point to analyze a video.
- [Analyze](https://commentsanalyzer.info/analyze): Paste a YouTube URL to run an analysis.
- [Pricing](https://commentsanalyzer.info/pricing): Free and paid plan comparison.
- [About](https://commentsanalyzer.info/about): What the tool does and who it is for.
- [FAQ](https://commentsanalyzer.info/faq): Common questions about accuracy, privacy, the Chrome extension, and limits.

## Analysis pages
- Each analyzed video has a shareable, permanent page at `https://commentsanalyzer.info/analysis/{videoId}` containing its sentiment breakdown, key themes, and summary.

## Policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://commentsanalyzer.info/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://commentsanalyzer.info/terms)
